title: poa sphondylodes var. strictula
intro: Poa sphondylodes var. strictula, also known as Chinese meadow grass, is a type of grass native to China and used in traditional medicine. It has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal effects. The health benefits of Poa sphondylodes var. strictula include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Poa sphondylodes var. strictula is typically prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts for medicinal use, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
